calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-04-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER
Off Calendar Nov-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Timothy Witczak, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank Association.

RE: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER

Plaintiff to address the procedural issues and provides proof as to complying to the electronic service civil procedure

Plaintiff argues and offers proof.

Upon conclusion of the hearing, The court vacates the tentative ruling and GRANTS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION AND APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER

Proposed order reviewed and signed this day.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: K.Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)
